title: cenchrus polystachios
intro: Cenchrus polystachios, also known as buffelgrass or buffelbush, is a perennial grass species native to Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cenchrus polystachios include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a digestive aid and a treatment for wounds. In herbal preparations, Cenchrus polystachios can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
